sectionHint: Pick a service domain. The engine itself is a generic service-flow queueing model; the cat café is just the first scenario I've built out fully.
lockedToast: The "{{name}}" domain is still on the roadmap. For now everything runs on the cat café.
roleMapTitle: How this domain maps to the model
roleMapHint: Same engine, a new scenario just renames the roles.
roadmapNote: The architecture now supports different service domains. I'll wire these scenarios onto the engine one by one.

cat-cafe.name: Cat café
cat-cafe.tagline: My flagship, fully built scenario: seats, staff, plus cats that wander over to greet customers on their own.

restaurant.name: Restaurant / ramen shop
restaurant.tagline: Tables, waiters, and serving cadence: the closest fit to the original café model.

clinic.name: Clinic / waiting room
clinic.tagline: Waiting chairs, clinicians, and visit flow: a classic service-flow problem.

bank.name: Bank / teller counter
bank.tagline: Ticketed queue, tellers, transactions: the textbook M/M/c example.

salon.name: Hair / nail salon
salon.tagline: Chairs, stylists, and appointments, with long service times.
